pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G. It's a bit of a squeeze in here, isn't it? What are you hoping to do with the prize money if things go your way?
Hey G, I'm B. Yeah, it's definitely tight in here. If I win, I'm looking to help out my family and make things a bit easier for them. How about you?
Same here, honestly. I’ve got people counting on me back home, and I want to make sure they’re set. Do you have any idea what kind of game we're actually playing?
Not a clue. All I know is there's a prize pool and I'm ready to do what it takes to win. Have you heard anything?
I’m in the dark too, just waiting for the rules to drop. Whatever it is, I’m just focused on that prize.
I hear you. It's hard not to be when there's so much on the line. I guess we just wait and see what they throw at us.
Yeah, the waiting is the worst part. Hopefully it’s something we can actually manage. Fingers crossed for both of us.
Definitely. I'm just ready to get this show on the road. Good luck to you, G.
Thanks, B. Good luck to you too. Hopefully we both walk away with what we need.
I hope so too. Let's see what happens when the game finally starts.
For sure. Let's stay sharp and see how it plays out. Catch you later.
